title.en: Upgrading PostgreSQL in a docker deployment
title.no: Upgrading PostgreSQL in a docker deployment

summary.en: Recently, I had to upgrade an older Django-Docker-PostgreSQL deployment, only to discover that PostgreSQL 9.0 files weren’t compatible with PostgreSQL 15.0. After many hours of trying and failing, and searching the ne...
